title: Bowl of Poached Vegetables
description: A simple and flavorful keto dish made with poached vegetables, ideal for a light and refreshing meal.

ingredients.name: Vegetables (such as broccoli, cauliflower, and carrots)

instructions: Fill a large bowl with ice and water.
Bring a pot of water to a boil and add a tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Carefully place the vegetables into the boiling water and poach for 3-5 minutes, or until tender.
Remove the vegetables from the water with a slotted spoon and place them into the bowl of ice water to stop the cooking process.
Once the vegetables have cooled, drain them and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the poached vegetables in a bowl and enjoy.
